heading: Severability
label: 4313 Severability
text: If any provision of this chapter or the application thereof to any person or circumstance is held invalid, the remainder of this chapter and the application of such provision to any other person or circumstance shall not be affected thereby.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1982section 204 of Pub. L. 97–241section 4301 of this title
